generated_oml:
// C3: Physical Sensing Components
instance AirQualitySensorSet : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Set of sensors on Raspberry Pi for real-time air quality monitoring (specific types like CO2, particulate matter, humidity not detailed)"
    DTDFVocab:producedData AirQualitySensorDataTransmitted
]

instance CranePositionEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Encoder sensor capturing position and velocity of gantry crane components (bridge, trolley, puck)"
    DTDFVocab:producedData CraneStateSensorDataTransmitted
]

instance CraneForceTorqueSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Force/torque sensor measuring mechanical loads on crane components"
    DTDFVocab:producedData CraneStateSensorDataTransmitted
]

instance CraneIMUSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Inertial Measurement Unit (IMU) capturing acceleration and orientation data"
    DTDFVocab:producedData CraneStateSensorDataTransmitted
]

instance GreenhouseEnvironmentalSensors : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Implied environmental sensors for greenhouse control (temperature, humidity, light levels) based on behavioral adaptation requirements"
    DTDFVocab:producedData GreenhouseEnvironmentalDataTransmitted
]

// C4: Physical-to-Virtual Interaction
instance AirQualitySensorDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom AirQualitySensorSet
    base:desc "Real-time air quality metrics transmitted from Raspberry Pi sensor set"
]

instance CraneStateSensorDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom CranePositionEncoder, CraneForceTorqueSensor, CraneIMUSensor
    base:desc "High-frequency crane state measurements including position, velocity, acceleration, controller feedback, and sensor readings"
]

instance GreenhouseEnvironmentalDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom GreenhouseEnvironmentalSensors
    base:desc "Environmental data stream from greenhouse sensors for behavioral adaptation"
]

// C10: Models/Data
instance AutomationMLAirQualityModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "AutomationML-based digital twin model for air quality management enabling runtime visualization and simulation"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo AzureDigitalTwinPipelineEnabler, InfluxDBTimeSeriesEnabler
]

instance GreenhouseBehavioralAdaptationModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Behavioral adaptation model for both physical greenhouse and its digital twin using prerecorded data"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo VirtualMachineDeploymentEnabler
]

instance CraneKinematicModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Mathematical kinematic model using Denavit-Hartenberg parameters describing crane joint trajectories and end-effector motion"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulationEngineEnabler, ControlOptimizationEnabler
]

instance CraneDynamicModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Dynamic simulation model capturing crane mechanical behavior and load interactions"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulationEngineEnabler, FaultDetectionEnabler
]

instance AirQualitySimulationModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Physics-based simulation model for air quality dynamics under varying conditions"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo AzureDigitalTwinPipelineEnabler
]

instance AirQualityPredictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Predictive analytics model for future air quality state forecasting"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo AzureDigitalTwinPipelineEnabler
]

instance CraneCADModel : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "3D geometric representation of crane components created in SolidWorks or Fusion 360"
    DTDFVocab:fromData CraneStateSensorDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo VisualizationEngineEnabler
]

instance CraneHistoricalData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Time-series operational data including sensor readings and control signals from crane operations"
    DTDFVocab:fromData CraneStateSensorDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo HistoricalLoggingEnabler, FaultDetectionEnabler
]

instance AirQualityRealTimeData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time air quality metrics from Raspberry Pi sensor set"
    DTDFVocab:fromData AirQualitySensorDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo RuntimeVisualizationEnabler
]

instance GreenhousePrerecordedData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Prerecorded environmental data stored in virtual machine images for behavioral adaptation"
    DTDFVocab:fromData GreenhouseEnvironmentalDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo GreenhouseBehavioralAdaptationModel
]

// C11: Enablers
instance AzureDigitalTwinPipelineEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Microsoft Azure tools for implementing digital twin pipeline including runtime visualization, simulation, and predictive analytics"
    DTDFVocab:enables AirQualityRuntimeVisualizationService, AirQualitySimulationService, AirQualityPredictionService
]

instance InfluxDBTimeSeriesEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Time-series database for storing and querying air quality sensor data with high temporal resolution"
    DTDFVocab:enables AirQualityDataLoggingService
]

instance ActiveMQMessageBrokerEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Message broker facilitating real-time data exchange between physical components and digital twin services"
    DTDFVocab:enables AirQualityDataStreamingService, CraneDataStreamingService
]

instance VirtualMachineDeploymentEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Virtual machine infrastructure hosting prerecorded greenhouse data and behavioral adaptation models"
    DTDFVocab:enables GreenhouseBehavioralAdaptationService
]

instance SimulationEngineEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Simulation engine (MATLAB/Simulink or Gazebo) for validating crane control strategies and dynamics"
    DTDFVocab:enables CraneSimulationService, OptimalControlService
]

instance ControlOptimizationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Control optimization framework using Gurobi/CPLEX or custom Python scripts for energy-efficient trajectory planning"
    DTDFVocab:enables OptimalControlService
]

instance VisualizationEngineEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "3D visualization engine (Unity/Blender/ROS RViz) for rendering crane states and digital twin predictions"
    DTDFVocab:enables CraneVisualizationService
]

instance HistoricalLoggingEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Time-series database (TimescaleDB/InfluxDB) for storing crane operational data with high-frequency logging"
    DTDFVocab:enables CraneHistoricalDataLoggingService
]

instance ValidationFrameworkEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Custom Python/MATLAB validation framework implementing residual analysis and state estimation for continuous validation"
    DTDFVocab:enables ContinuousValidationService
]

instance FaultDetectionEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Fault detection algorithms using Isolation Forest, SVM, or rule-based thresholds trained on labeled crane data"
    DTDFVocab:enables CraneFaultDetectionService
]

instance MQTTBrokerEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MQTT broker facilitating signaling between crane services (Trajectory Generator, Simulation, Dashboard)"
    DTDFVocab:enables CraneDataStreamingService, ContinuousValidationService
]

instance DarTwinNotationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Domain-specific language for documenting system evolution and validation rules in machine-readable format"
    DTDFVocab:enables ContinuousValidationService
]

// C6: Services
instance AirQualityRuntimeVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time visualization of indoor air quality metrics from Raspberry Pi sensor data"
    DTDFVocab:provides AirQualityVisualizationInsight
]

instance AirQualitySimulationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Simulation of air quality dynamics under varying conditions (e.g., virus spread prevention scenarios)"
    DTDFVocab:provides AirQualitySimulationInsight
]

instance AirQualityPredictionService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Prediction of future air quality states using digital twin pipeline on Microsoft Azure"
    DTDFVocab:provides AirQualityPredictionInsight
]

instance AirQualityDataLoggingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Time-series data storage and retrieval for air quality operational analytics"
    DTDFVocab:provides AirQualityDataInsight
]

instance AirQualityDataStreamingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time data exchange between Raspberry Pi sensors and digital twin services via ActiveMQ"
    DTDFVocab:provides AirQualityDataStreamingInsight
]

instance GreenhouseBehavioralAdaptationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Behavioral adaptation service for greenhouse environmental control using prerecorded data"
    DTDFVocab:provides GreenhouseEnvironmentalControlInsight
]

instance CraneSimulationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Simulation of crane dynamics and validation of control strategies before physical deployment"
    DTDFVocab:provides CraneSimulationInsight
]

instance OptimalControlService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time control optimization using digital models to refine crane movements and minimize energy consumption"
    DTDFVocab:provides OptimalCraneControlAction
]

instance CraneVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Interactive 3D/2D visualization of crane states and digital twin predictions"
    DTDFVocab:provides CraneStateVisualizationInsight
]

instance CraneHistoricalDataLoggingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Time-series data storage and retrieval for crane operational analytics and performance benchmarking"
    DTDFVocab:provides CraneHistoricalDataInsight
]

instance ContinuousValidationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time consistency checking between physical crane states and digital twin predictions"
    DTDFVocab:provides CraneValidationInsight, ContinuousValidationAction
]

instance CraneFaultDetectionService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Anomaly detection in crane operations using machine learning or rule-based models"
    DTDFVocab:provides CraneFaultDetectionInsight, FaultAlertAction
]

instance CraneDataStreamingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "High-frequency data transmission from physical crane to digital twin components via MQTT broker"
    DTDFVocab:provides CraneDataStreamingInsight
]

instance RuntimeVisualizationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "The **Virtual-to-Physical Interaction** in this Digital Twin system is mediated by the **Control Application**, which generates commands based on inputs from the **Trajectory Generator Service** and user instructions via the **Human Machine Interface (HMI)**. The control flow begins with the **Trajectory Generator Service**, which utilizes a **kinematics model** to generate **optimal movement trajectories** (e.g., smooth, residual-swing-free paths) for the crane. These trajectories are transmitted as **control commands** to the **Control Application**, which formats them into messages for the **Physical Crane Interface**. The command types include **position/velocity setpoints** and **trajectory profiles**, with formats likely adhering to the **Physical Crane Interface’s** Python-based communication protocol. Validation and authentication mechanisms are not explicitly detailed, but the **Continuous Validation Service** ensures that executed trajectories align with simulations, implying a **closed-loop feedback system**. Conflict resolution is not described, though the **Dashboard** notifies operators if thresholds are breached, suggesting manual intervention for discrepancies. Command execution confirmation is implied by the **Logging Application’s** continuous state logging, which records the crane’s response to commands for later validation."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin systems in the documents follow an **ad-hoc, lightweight orchestration pattern** without reliance on commercial frameworks. The **GreenhouseDT** exemplar uses **InfluxDB (time-series database)**, **ActiveMQ (message broker)**, and **virtual machines** to enable **behavioral adaptation** of both physical and digital components, suggesting a **loosely coupled, event-driven architecture** for synchronization. The **Air Quality Management** exemplar employs **AutomationML-based digital twins** and **Microsoft Azure tools** for a **pipeline-oriented orchestration**, integrating runtime visualization, simulation, and prediction services. The **gantry crane** system leverages the **C4 Model** for architecture visualization, implying a **modular, containerized deployment** (e.g., via virtualization) but lacks explicit details on resource management or system-wide coordination. **No centralized orchestration engine** is mentioned; instead, **containerization/virtualization** (e.g., virtual machines, Raspberry Pi) serves as the primary integration mechanism."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "The **Air Quality Management** exemplar emphasizes **runtime validation** through visualization, simulation, and prediction, suggesting iterative model refinement. The **GreenhouseDT** focuses on **self-adaptive behavioral models**, implying dynamic fidelity adjustments via real-time feedback loops. Validation methods are not explicitly described, but the use of **prerecorded data** in virtual machines hints at offline testing. Uncertainty quantification and error correction mechanisms are not detailed, though the ad-hoc approach may rely on empirical adjustments. Quality assurance processes are implied by the exemplar’s research-driven design but lack specific methodologies."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "The **Digital Twin’s Technical Connection** infrastructure relies on a **service-oriented architecture** with the following key components: (1) **MQTT Broker** for lightweight, publish-subscribe-based signaling between services (e.g., **Trajectory Generator Service**, **Simulation Service**, **Continuous Validation Service**, and **Dashboard**), ensuring low-latency communication. The network topology is not explicitly defined, but the system implies a **local or edge deployment** (given the lab-scale context) with direct connections between containers. Bandwidth and latency requirements are not quantified, but the **Continuous Validation Service**’s real-time trajectory comparison suggests **low-latency (<100ms) data exchange** between the **Physical Crane Interface** and digital services. Reliability and redundancy mechanisms are not detailed, though the **MQTT Broker** and **TimescaleDB** (a time-series database) imply fault-tolerant data handling. Security protocols are not specified, but the use of a **dedicated MQTT Broker** and **TimescaleDB** suggests controlled access to critical data streams."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "The **Digital Twin’s Hosting and Deployment** infrastructure is **on-premise** (or edge-deployed) due to the lab-scale gantry crane’s localized operation. The system comprises six containers, each hosted on a shared or dedicated computational platform (likely a **local server or cluster**) with the following requirements: (1) **Database (TimescaleDB)**: Stores time-series data from the **Logging Application**, requiring **high write throughput** and **low-latency queries** for real-time validation. (2) **Trajectory Generator Service** and **Simulation Service**: Demand **moderate computational resources** for kinematic modeling and trajectory simulation. (3) **Continuous Validation Service**: Requires **real-time processing** to compare executed vs. simulated trajectories. (4) **Dashboard (Grafana)**: Needs **low-latency data visualization** capabilities. (5) **MQTT Broker**: Acts as a lightweight intermediary for service communication. Scalability mechanisms are not explicitly described, but the modular container-based architecture (inspired by the C4 Model) allows for **horizontal scaling** of services (e.g., additional **Trajectory Generator** instances). Deployment models are **containerized** (Python applications) and likely managed via a **local orchestration tool** (e.g., Docker Compose). Availability/reliability assurance is implied by the **Continuous Validation Service’s** threshold-based alerts and the **Logging Application’s** persistent data storage, though no explicit redundancy (e.g., failover) is mentioned."
]

instance horizontal_integration : DTDFVocab:HoriIntegration [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin systems demonstrate **limited horizontal integration** with external systems, relying on **ad-hoc protocols** and **domain-specific tools**. The **GreenhouseDT** exemplar integrates **InfluxDB (time-series storage)** and **ActiveMQ (message broker)** for internal data exchange but does not specify interoperability with external enterprise systems. The **Air Quality Management** exemplar uses **AutomationML** for digital twin modeling and **Microsoft Azure** for cloud-based pipeline execution, indicating **standardized data exchange** within its ecosystem but no explicit integration with other Digital Twins or legacy systems. The **gantry crane** system lacks documented external dependencies, though its **C4 Model architecture** suggests potential for **modular integration** via containerization. **No standardized protocols (e.g., OPC UA, MQTT, REST APIs)** or enterprise system dependencies (e.g., ERP, MES) are mentioned, implying **isolated, siloed implementations**."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin exemplars exhibit **partial standardization**:
  - **AutomationML** is used in the Air Quality Management exemplar for **digital twin representation**, adhering to a **construction engineering standard** for interoperability.
  - **Microsoft Azure tools** (e.g., cloud services) imply compliance with **Microsoft’s certification frameworks** (e.g., ISO 27001 for security), though no explicit certifications are mentioned.
  - **InfluxDB** (time-series database) and **ActiveMQ** (message broker) in GreenhouseDT suggest adherence to **open-source protocols** (e.g., MQTT for IoT data exchange), but no formal interoperability standards (e.g., OPC UA, FIWARE) are cited.
  - The gantry crane exemplar lacks explicit standardization references, relying on **ad-hoc C4 Model** documentation. No industry-specific standards (e.g., IEC 62443 for cyber-physical systems) or compliance frameworks are mentioned."
]
